What I Bring to Your Project

From raw images to clean, validated datasets — I cover the full annotation and quality control pipeline.

🎯
2D Polygon Segmentation
Precise polygon annotation for instance and semantic segmentation. Tight boundaries, zero padding, full occlusion handling.
CVATPolygonSegmentation
📦
3D LiDAR Annotation
Cuboid labeling and point cloud segmentation on Segments.ai. Complex multi-sensor datasets annotated with depth precision.
Segments.aiLiDARCuboids
🔍
Quality Assurance & Review
Central reviewer role — final validation checkpoint before dataset delivery. Error detection, correction logging, and compliance verification.
QAReviewValidation
🎬
Video Annotation & Tracking
Frame-by-frame object tracking, temporal consistency checks, and keyframe annotation for video datasets.
VideoTrackingKeyframes
📋
Guideline Development
Writing and enforcing annotation standards. Training annotators and defining edge-case protocols for consistent large-scale labeling.
StandardsTrainingProtocols
📊
Dataset Reporting
Structured QA reports with error logs, accuracy metrics, class distribution analysis, and delivery-ready documentation.
ReportingMetricsDocs
Portfolio

Urban Vehicle Detection

30 urban street images — polygon segmentation across 6 vehicle classes. Tool: CVAT. Final accuracy: 98%.

Project: Urban Vehicle Detection — Vol. 1

Multi-class polygon segmentation on real urban driving footage. All objects annotated per strict guidelines: cars, trucks, buses, motorcycles, bicycles, pedestrians.

Quality Assurance

My QA Process

Every dataset I review goes through a structured checklist before delivery. No errors leave my desk uncorrected.

Central Review — What I Catch

Label Accuracy
100%
Annotation Consistency
98%+
Guideline Compliance
100%
Polygon Precision
High
  • All visible objects annotated — no unlabeled instances
  • Polygon boundaries tight — no excessive padding or gaps
  • Truncated objects annotated on visible portion only
  • Class labels consistent — no ambiguous assignments
  • Occluded objects annotated on visible area only
  • Full error log produced with before/after correction

Error Detection Example — Before & After Review

QA Correction Logged
Error type: Polygon to loose to the object
Status: FIXED
Method: Label corrected + polygon boundary tightened
